scripts.dev: npm run build -w @billing/shared && node apps/backend/scripts/kill-port.mjs 4000 && node apps/backend/scripts/kill-port.mjs 3000 && concurrently "npm run dev -w @billing/backend" "npm run dev -w @billing/frontend"
scripts.dev:backend: npm run build -w @billing/shared && npm run dev -w @billing/backend
scripts.dev:reset: npm run build -w @billing/shared && node apps/backend/scripts/kill-port.mjs 4000 && node apps/backend/scripts/kill-port.mjs 3000 && npm run prisma:generate && npm run clean -w @billing/backend && npm run clean -w @billing/frontend && concurrently "npm run dev:fresh -w @billing/backend" "npm run dev -w @billing/frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @billing/shared && npm run build -w @billing/backend && npm run build -w @billing/frontend
scripts.prisma:setup: npm run prisma:generate && npm run prisma:deploy && npm run prisma:seed
